summary: CDK Constructs and Terraform VPC Module Testing Complete. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified showing all 6 stat cards (CDK: 8 Constructs, TF Modules: 12 Modules), CDK Constructs section with expandable construct cards, file toggle buttons, and Terraform VPC module with networking category.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/cve/iac/cdk/constructs returns correct data: exists=true, 8 constructs, 20 services
GET /api/cve/iac/terraform/modules returns correct data: 12 modules (including vpc), 40 resources
CDK endpoint returns all required fields: name, file, description, icon, category, services, exports, code, lines
CDK endpoint returns stack_file (lib/infra-stack.ts) and entry_file (bin/infra.ts) with code
CDK endpoint returns config_files: package.json, cdk.json, tsconfig.json
Terraform VPC module has 10 resources across main.tf (aws_vpc, aws_subnet private/public, aws_internet_gateway, aws_eip, aws_nat_gateway, aws_route_table, aws_route_table_association)
Frontend InfraTab displays all 6 stat cards: Terraform (Configured), CDK (8 Constructs), Lambda, GitHub Actions, Deployments, TF Modules (12 Modules)
CDK Constructs section shows 8 construct cards: api, auth, dynamodb, eventbridge, frontend, kinesis, lambdas, qldb
CDK section has toggleable file viewers for infra-stack.ts, bin/infra.ts, package.json, cdk.json, tsconfig.json
CDK construct cards expand to show services list and code preview
Terraform modules section shows vpc module with networking category and 10 resources
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - testing existing infrastructure files
context_for_next_testing_agent: CDK Constructs and Terraform VPC module infrastructure complete. GET /api/cve/iac/cdk/constructs scans /app/infra-cdk/ directory and returns construct metadata with file contents. GET /api/cve/iac/terraform/modules now returns 12 modules including vpc. Frontend InfraTab displays CDK stat card and CDK Constructs section with expandable construct cards.

mocked_apis.note: All data is served from actual CDK files under /app/infra-cdk/ and Terraform files under /app/infra-terraform/
